name: nemotron-personas-korea
description: Korean LLM-as-respondent toolkit built around the nvidia/Nemotron-Personas-Korea HuggingFace dataset (1M synthetic Korean adults). Bundles dataset-reference and dispatch-strategy skills, the bigfive-selfimage-run runbook + bigfive-selfimage-iter-campaign runbook (augmentation-iteration variant) + bulk-reply-save save pattern for batched dispatches, persona-respondent and persona-respondent-v2 sub-agents (v2 adds bracket-as-stage-direction + multi-item dispatch), and a /persona-interviewee slash command for in-character qualitative interviews.
